title: The Watcher Of The Night
description: Don't let its fake appearance fool you...
body: ### I AM ABSOLUTELY ACCEPTING FEEDBACK! PLEASE MAKE A COMMENT WITH YOUR EXPERIENCE AS IT WILL HELP ME IMPROVE THE MOD!!! # UPDATE ALPHA V1.0.2 IS OUT NOW GO GO GOOOO!!!! # Summary Dive into a terrifying new Minecraft experience with this new horror mod. This mod introduces a fearsome entity known as "The Watcher," an entity that spawns exclusively at night. His eerie arrival is marked by a dramatic lightning strike and the ominous sound of a heartbeat, instantly forcing all players into survival mode. Surviving an encounter with The Watcher is no easy feat. Upon his defeat, players are cursed with poison, the in-game time is reset to midnight, and a thunderstorm rolls in, heightening the atmospheric tension. However, you'll hear a chilling victory anthem as a twisted reward for your victory. This mod aims to elevate your Minecraft gameplay with suspense, horror, and thrilling challenges. # functions /function the_watcher_of_the_night:msgscript /function the_watcher_of_the_night:watcher_death # sounds /playsound the_watcher_of_the_night:chase.music /playsound the_watcher_of_the_night:the.good.ending /playsound the_watcher_of_the_night:watcher.hurt /playsound the_watcher_of_the_night:watcher.idle /playsound the_watcher_of_the_night:absorb_me... **_Dont ask..._** /playsound the_watcher_of_the_night:heartbeat # drops Withered Rose (soon to be changed) # credits: Chase Music: Hunting Beast - dead currents - Watcher SFX: by AlesiaDavina from Pixabay - Heart Beat SFX: by BRVHRTZ from Pixabay
